mapper.select: SELECT sq.*, u.name AS username, k.coursename AS courseName, r.username AS reviewerName, CASE WHEN sq.status = 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN sq.status = 1 THEN '已通过' WHEN sq.status = 2 THEN '已拒绝' ELSE '未知状态' END AS statusText FROM selectionapplication sq LEFT JOIN student u ON sq.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course k ON sq.course_id = k.id LEFT JOIN users r ON sq.reviewer_id = r.id ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT sq.*, u.name AS username, k.coursename AS courseName, r.username AS reviewerName, CASE WHEN sq.status = 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN sq.status = 1 THEN '已通过' WHEN sq.status = 2 THEN '已拒绝' ELSE '未知状态' END AS statusText FROM selectionapplication sq LEFT JOIN student u ON sq.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course k ON sq.course_id = k.id LEFT JOIN users r ON sq.reviewer_id = r.id ${ew.sqlSegment}
